docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,458.00 FILED BY TRUBNIKOV YURY DBA EUROPEAN HOME DESIGN AS TO DEFENDANT WONG MR DBA WONG CONSTRUCTION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-07-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
